ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interrupts" (
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interrupt type */,
  "bit_range" TEXT /* Bit range associated with the interrupt */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the interrupt field */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Reset value of the interrupt */,
  "rw_type" TEXT /* Read/Write type of the interrupt */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interrupt field */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the interrupt (e.g., receive, transmit) */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the interrupt (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the interrupt details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interrupt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interrupt_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interrupt status entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interrupt */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the interrupt */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "status_changed_by" TEXT /* User who last changed the status */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupt_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupt_status_interrupt_id FOREIGN KEY ("interrupt_id") REFERENCES interrupts ("interrupt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interrupt_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interrupt configuration */,
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interrupt */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "configuration_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration expires */,
  "configured_by" TEXT /* User who configured the settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupt_configurations_interrupt_id FOREIGN KEY ("interrupt_id") REFERENCES interrupts ("interrupt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interrupt_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interrupt */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., triggered, reset) */,
  "event_value" TEXT /* Value of the interrupt at the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was logged */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) that generated the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupt_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupt_logs_interrupt_id FOREIGN KEY ("interrupt_id") REFERENCES interrupts ("interrupt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for quick contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interrupt */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_interrupt_id FOREIGN KEY ("interrupt_id") REFERENCES interrupts ("interrupt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interrupt */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  "action_value" TEXT /* Value of the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_interrupt_id FOREIGN KEY ("interrupt_id") REFERENCES interrupts ("interrupt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
